current_behavior: Interacting with a Rank Examiner CustomNPC runs the evaluation as the interacting player.
The manual command /function ascendant_identity:rank_examiner/evaluate is an admin/test hook only, not a player-facing feature.
The function shows proof counters, promotes the player if requirements are met, and refreshes the visible player rank team.
If the CustomNPC bridge cannot execute, the NPC reports that the Guild ledger is unavailable instead of telling the player to type a command.
future_upgrade: Replace simple score thresholds with authored FTB Quest rank trials.
Tie bounties completed, structures cleared, dungeon boss kills, regional discoveries, and rival events into the trial matrix.
Keep the public rank display separate from the Ascendant Web skill level.
